input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.5.3
            TITLE: repeated violations may void inspection approval or receive additional penalties up to and

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.5.3: Repeated Violations may void Inspection Approval or receive additional penalties up to and
EV.3.5.3 Repeated Violations may void Inspection Approval or receive additional penalties up to and 
including Disqualification, subject to official discretion.

final_answer: Repeated Violations may void Inspection Approval or receive additional penalties up to and including Disqualification, subject to official discretion.
